originalAlarm.description: Assigned value is garbage or undefined

sanitizedDescription: Assigned value is garbage or undefined
reasoning: At L67, curr->next = head assigns the uninitialized head pointer into curr->next. head is declared at L60 but not assigned until L68 (head = curr), so on the first loop iteration (i=0), head is garbage when read at L67. Genuine use of uninitialized variable. No // ERROR at L67 (the // ERROR at L33 marks a different dfree bug). New bug. PC = (SORTFILES OR !SORTFILES) = true, correctly constrained since L60-70 is outside all #ifdef blocks and the bug fires on all configs.
